brands.name: Kova
brands.description: A DTC running watch brand scaling through performance marketing and community-driven social.
brands.spend_profile: Performance-heavy, lower spend magnitudes. TikTok saturates faster than Meta.

brands.name: Poppa Bueno
brands.description: A family-owned hot sauce brand that went viral and is now scaling into retail with a mix of broadcast and digital spend.
brands.spend_profile: TV-heavy with high OOH. Trade_Promo is a derived channel with lumpy, event-driven spend.

brands.name: Nestwork
brands.description: A B2B proptech platform for independent landlords, relying on thought leadership and intent-based channels.
brands.spend_profile: Lower overall spend. LinkedIn dominates. Webinars is a derived channel with event-cadence noise.

conservative.description: Skeptical of all channels — tight prior, posterior stays close to zero

balanced.description: Neutral / no strong belief — moderate prior, data drives the posterior

aggressive.description: Believes channels are strong drivers — wide prior, high posterior flexibility
